hooks.command: FAILED=0; if [ -n "$(find backend/tests/hurl -name '*.hurl' 2>/dev/null)" ]; then HURL_OUT=$(hurl --test backend/tests/hurl/*.hurl --variable base_url=http://localhost:8000 2>&1); HURL_EC=$?; echo "$HURL_OUT" | tail -5; [ $HURL_EC -ne 0 ] && FAILED=1; fi; if [ -n "$(find frontend/e2e -name '*.spec.ts' 2>/dev/null)" ]; then PW_OUT=$((cd frontend && npx playwright test --reporter=line) 2>&1); PW_EC=$?; echo "$PW_OUT" | tail -5; [ $PW_EC -ne 0 ] && FAILED=1; fi; [ $FAILED -eq 1 ] && exit 2; exit 0
